title: Upgraded Chests: Search & Quick-Transfer
description: Massive Upgraded Chests with built-in Search & Instant Move. From simple Iron Chests to big Netherite storage, this is the ultimate overhaul for fast resource transfers.
body:
![Upgraded Chests: Search & Quick-Transfer](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/1.png?raw=true)

Upgraded Chests is the definitive storage overhaul for Minecraft, combining massive capacity, intelligent search tools, and instant resource transfers within a sleek, modern GUI designed for speed and simplicity.

![Key Features](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/2.png?raw=true)

- **Smart Search Engine**: Locate any item instantly within large containers using the built-in real-time filtering system.

- **Instant Resource Management**: Dedicated buttons to "Deposit All" or "Withdraw All" your inventory with a single click.

- **Fireproof Construction**: Every chest in this mod is completely immune to fire and lava, ensuring your loot is never lost to an accident.

- **Netherite Blast Immunity**: The Netherite Tier is 100% explosion-proof (TNT & Creepers), providing the ultimate security for your most valuable items.
 
- **Modern Aesthetic**: A minimalist, high-performance UI featuring full scrolling support and smooth item transitions.

![Media](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/3.png?raw=true)

![gif1](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/Animation%20(1).gif?raw=true)
![gif2](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/Animation%20(2).gif?raw=true)
![gif3](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/Animation%20(3).gif?raw=true)
![ui](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/p.png?raw=true)
![Chests](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/p2.png?raw=true)

![Progressive Recipes](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/4.png?raw=true)

This mod utilizes a Tiered Upgrade System. Instead of crafting high-level chests from scratch, you must use the previous tier as the core base for the next upgrade.

![items](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/items.png?raw=true)

![Platforms & Compatibility](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/5.png?raw=true)

- **Supported Loaders**: This mod is fully compatible with Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge.
 
- **Server Support**: Optimized for both Singleplayer and Multiplayer. You can run this mod on dedicated servers using any of the supported loaders for a seamless experience.

![Project Info](https://github.com/in2bubble/Upgraded-Chests-Search-Quick-Transfer-Midea/blob/main/Midea/6.png?raw=true)
